records.ety: [F. horde (cf. G. horde), fr. Turk. ordū, ordī, camp; of Tartar origin.]

defs: A wandering troop or gang; especially, a clan or tribe of a nomadic people migrating from place to place for the sake of pasturage, plunder, etc.; a predatory multitude.
Any large group of people or animals, especially one wandering or moving about; as, the movie star was surrounded by a horde of screaming fans.
